response: John Lennon was born in 1940. He was an English singer, songwriter, musician, and activist who co-founded the Beatles. Bill Harry, a classmate of John Lennon at Liverpool Art College, founded Mersey Beat. Therefore, the English singer, songwriter, musician, and co-founder of the Beatles born in 1940, whose classmate Bill Harry founded Mersey Beat at Liverpool Art College, was born in 1940.
